progress_summary: 2026-05-31 PR-review wave: cleared 11 open PRs in one session. Feature: #239 (email-pipeline Step 5 nested-form fix, follow-up to #233) and #243 (link orphaned /coverage into nav, ⌘K palette, stack-forge skill page). Security: #227 (DOMPurify 3.4.5 XSS-bypass fix in the markdown group) and #209 (js-yaml v3→v4 with prototype-pollution patch — verified all callsites use only `yaml.load`, safe across the major). Dependency hygiene: #241 vitest 4.1.6, #211 tailwind 4.3, #210 astro group, #175 zod 4.4.3, #176 @axe-core/playwright 4.11.3, #242 @playwright/test 1.60, #173 wrangler 4.95 (Dependabot recreated to latest after lockfile conflict). All squash-merged with full CI green (Worker, Site, LHCI). #208 (chore(generated): restore stale coverage-flags + api-dev-adapters baselines) closed as obsolete — main now carries 26 coverage-flags and 13 api-dev-adapters via the v1.4 chain, vs. #208's 5/5 from the pre-v1.4 era. Held for user review: #232 (feat(compare): switch to Option C — groups + zebra + winner dots + mobile sticky labels), branch up-to-date with main, CI green, awaiting user signoff before merge. Production is now ~12 PRs behind staging.opchain.dev; deploy gap surfaced as the next blocker (deploy-ops hand-off). Required pre-flight: `wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY` on both staging and prod envs before the email-pipeline flag flips on.

progress_table.label: PR #183 — v1.4 install upgrade flow + main-CI repairs
PR #184 — demo-mobile test fix (closed, folded into #183)
PR #186 — fix(demo): drop hardcoded "scenarios · 6" sidebar count
PR #213 — feat(site): redesigned homepage + grouped header + ⌘K palette
PR #223 — feat(changelog): roadmap timeline + Linear-connected feature-request form
PR #233 — feat(email-pipeline): Resend-powered /api/email-pipeline + name field on Step 5

key_decisions: Manual deploys per CLAUDE.md — git-ops only handles branch/commit/push/PR; deploy-ops owns wrangler.
Rebased #183 onto a moved main (one checkpoint conflict, took --theirs to keep this branch's gate state).

After rebase, main turned out to have 5 pre-existing CI failures that were silently broken on main itself. Per user direction, fixed all 5 in #183 rather than open a separate hotfix PR — scope creep was the cheaper path to merge.

Test loosening on changelog-and-scenarios.spec.ts: the original toHaveCount(1) over-specified a contract the changelog page never actually held; switched to .first() + toBeVisible() and split test fixtures (v13_LINKED for changelog assertion, ALL_PICKABLE for /demo picker coverage).

Pixel 5 demo-mobile scenario count needed two bumps in this session: 6→9 (v1.2 carry-over, originally on PR #184) then 9→12 (v1.3 additions, on the rebased #183). Both surfaced only on CI; can't run Playwright locally (no chromium browsers in this env).
Used --force-with-lease once after the rebase. No --force, --amend, or --no-verify.
generated_files: Branch ref claude/fix-demo-mobile-scenario-count — closed branch (PR #184), deletable
user_preferences: Wants draft PRs by default per session-level GitHub policy (PR #183 was opened ready-for-review per harness instructions for this session).
Merges directly with single `merge` command after CI is mostly green; LHCI failures are treated as informational by default.

next_actions: Hand off to deploy-ops: production is ~12 PRs behind main (today's wave + earlier #225/#231/#233 etc). Run `export LINEAR_API_KEY=lin_api_…; npm run deploy:staging` → curl /api/health → `npm run deploy`. Two security patches in the wave (DOMPurify XSS, js-yaml prototype pollution) make this time-sensitive.
Pre-flight before email-pipeline flag flips on: `wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY` on staging + production. Verify the opchain.dev sending domain in Resend dashboard first.
Held for user review: PR #232 (feat(compare): switch to Option C) — branch is up-to-date with main, all 4 checks green, ready when user approves. Either squash-merge or close.

Linear hygiene (non-git): ADEV-347/348 duplicate `v1.5 Sprint 3 — agent-forge + prompt-ops bodies` tickets — pick canonical, cancel the other. Both currently labelled `roadmap-visible` so both surface on the public roadmap.
Schedule code-auditor pre-deploy sweep before v1.5 Sprint 2/3 land (agent-forge + claude-api + rag-forge introduce prompt-injection / tool-use surfaces that warrant new audit rules).

merged_prs.ci_intermediate: Commit 488cada (data layer) failed site/install/type-check/build because CI's site job doesn't run root prebuild, so the dynamic JSON import in roadmap-types.ts had no module to resolve. Fixed in commit 2091b4a by switching to a synchronous fs.readFileSync at SSG time with an empty-fallback.

merged_prs.security_note: Major bump v3→v4. Verified safe: all 5 callsites (pack-dispatch.js, gen-packs-catalog.mjs, gen-stack-packs.mjs, gen-api-dev-adapters.mjs, tests/stack-packs-real.test.js) use only `yaml.load(string)` which is behavior-compatible across the major (becomes safe-by-default, equiv to v3 safeLoad). No use of removed `safe*` APIs, DEFAULT_SAFE_SCHEMA, !!binary, or !!js/function.
